name: host-control-socket-pivot-prevention
description: Contained children must still mask guessed host-control Unix socket paths after env vars are scrubbed so they cannot pivot through the host boundary.

expected.status_reason: Reason: launch inherited host-control sockets that had to be masked inside containment; launch inherited host-control env that had to be scrubbed before containment
expected.status_impact: Impact: host control channels were present at launch; relaunch from a cleaner environment for the strongest boundary
expected.status_fix: close or avoid forwarding host-control bridges before launch:
expected.doctor_fix: Fix: relaunch from a minimal env, for example: env -u DOCKER_HOST -u SSH_AUTH_SOCK sir run claude
